title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Today, I'm going to take you around the city and show you all of the Christmassy sites and activities you can do while you're here.
So I'm going to try it.
We're going to go a little bit closer and get a better look at the windows.
I'm going to enjoy my food, watch a movie, and go to sleep right away.

title: will / shall
examples: So anywhere you go, it'll be pretty crazy and crowded with people.
Well seasoned.
Even though this is expensive, I will say they give you a generous amount of meat.
We are heading to Diker Heights in Brooklyn because it's really well known for its Christmas light display.
It's about an hour on the subway, but it'll be nice to rest my legs for a while.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Today, I'm going to take you around the city and show you all of the Christmassy sites and activities you can do while you're here.
So let's get going and see what we can find to eat.
Can I do the Matcha broth latte, please?
I can taste the coconut more.
As you can see, there are gigantic wreaths all along the side of the building.

title: may / might (possibility)
examples: I may have missed out on the viral hot chocolate earlier, but this one is even better because it's spiked.

title: may/might have (done)
examples: I may have missed out on the viral hot chocolate earlier, but this one is even better because it's spiked.

title: have to / must
examples: So I felt like I had to support it.
So you only have to pay to rent some skates.
If you're in New York City during the holiday season, you must see the rockets perform at Radio City, at least once in your life.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: We're at Macy's, which has what I would say, probably the most iconic holiday window display each year.
This would be my house.

title: Passive (is done / was done)
examples: You can tell it was made fresh.
This thing is packed with meat.
They are known for their synchronized dance moves and especially for their kick line.

title: have something done
examples: They have a carousel right behind me.
And we still got a seep out here.
